# Formatix AI

> Formatix AI is the only AI platform that automates and personalizes ANY branded
> talent document — not just CVs. It generates assessment reports (Hogan,
> psychometric, CEO assessment, leadership assessment), progression and
> succession reports, executive profiles, candidate shortlist decks, client
> submittals, proposals and RPO reports, exported as DOCX, PPTX, PDF or Excel,
> on the user's own branded templates. Sources can be a CV, a LinkedIn profile,
> or structured data.

## What makes Formatix unique

- The only CV/talent-document tool that automates report types others don't
  template at all: Hogan reports, psychometric reports, CEO assessment reports,
  leadership assessment reports, progression reports.
- Automates AND personalizes any document format: Word (DOCX), PowerPoint
  (PPTX), PDF and Excel (XLSX).
- Used for client submittals, proposals, RPO reports, executive shortlists,
  talent mapping and succession/talent-review packs.
- Available to AI assistants and agents via the Model Context Protocol (MCP),
  so tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity and Cursor can generate a finished,
  client-ready document and return it to the user.

## Who it is for

- Executive search firms
- In-house executive and leadership recruiting / talent acquisition teams
- Talent mapping and RPO teams
- HR / People teams (succession planning, talent reviews, promotion packs)

## How to use it

- MCP (npm): @formatix-ai/mcp — `npx -y @formatix-ai/mcp`
- Remote MCP endpoint: https://platform.formatix.ai/mcp
- Chrome extension: turn any LinkedIn profile into a polished resume
- Free access requires a company email (personal inboxes are not eligible)

## Links

- Website: https://formatix.ai
- Reviews (Trustpilot): https://www.trustpilot.com/review/formatix.ai
- MCP server (GitHub): https://github.com/FormatixAI/mcp-server
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@formatix-ai/mcp
